hero.title: Master Global Trade with Data-Driven Certainty.
hero.subtitle: Ensure compliance and optimize your supply chain before customs execution. From CBAM regulations to tariff optimization, we clear the path for your global expansion.
hero.trustline: Powering high-growth exporters and manufacturers worldwide.

problem.title: Breaking hidden barriers in global trade
problem.subtitle: International expansion often fails at the border. We eliminate the three most critical friction points before they impact your bottom line.

card1.title: Regulatory & Tariff Risks
card1.body: Incorrect HS codes and missing certifications lead to massive delays and penalties. Pre-auditing your data reduces operational friction by 40% and prevents costly post-clearance corrections.

card2.title: CBAM & ESG Accountability
card2.body: The Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) is no longer optional. We provide the data framework necessary to keep your products flowing through Europe's green corridors.

card3.title: Data-Driven, Not Intuition-Based
card3.body: Many firms choose new markets based on trends rather than logistics, tariff structures, and demand signals. Our analytics utilize weighted market modeling to your advantage.

reports.title: Trade Intelligence Reports
reports.subtitle: Import Intelligence and Export Intelligence are offered in flexible packages (15, 25, or 50+) based on your catalog size. Our strategic analysis is a custom, one-time project for your firm.

mail.subject: DutyInsight | Inquiry regarding {{plan}} Solution
mail.body:
Hello DutyInsight Team,

We are interested in your {{plan}} solution and would like to learn more about the process.

Best regards,

starter.name: Import Intelligence
starter.description: Assess your products' readiness for import before the logistics chain begins. Available in flexible product packages.
starter.feature4: Customs duty and tax risk assessment

business.name: Export Intelligence
business.description: Analyze the operational readiness of your products for export in the right corridor. Scaled to your export volume.

enterprise.name: Strategy Intelligence
enterprise.description: Comprehensive strategic reports, executive summaries, and investor-ready briefs generated from structured business data.

reports.footnote: Unused report credits in Import/Export packages are valid for 12 months.

strategy.title: Master the hidden dynamics of global trade.
strategy.subtitle: Strategy Intelligence is a personalized market analysis and investment advisory for firms seeking data-driven international expansion.

feature1.title: Market Prioritization
feature1.body: We model the markets with the highest ROI using weighted data on tariffs, logistics, and demand.

feature2.title: Competitor Mapping
feature2.body: Detailed analysis of your competition's pricing strategies, supply chains, and market entry methods.

feature3.title: Regulatory Roadmap
feature3.body: Managing the impact of CBAM, ESG, and new EU/US trade regulations on your 2026-2028 growth cycle.

feature4.title: Board Briefing
feature4.body: Premium strategic reports (30-50 pages) and board-level presentations ready for investors.

strategy.ctaBody: We listen to your business goals and define the scope of your custom strategy together.

hub.title: Two Hubs. Global Access.
hub.subtitle: Bridging manufacturing powerhouses with the heart of Europe through our Istanbul and Prague centers.

istanbul.title: Customs & Compliance
istanbul.description: Leveraging strategic location to manage high-volume trade corridors, ensuring flawless customs documentation.

prague.title: EU Market Access
prague.description: Located in the heart of Europe to navigate CBAM, IOSS, and EU customs reforms directly at the source.

social.title: Join Our Network
social.subtitle: Follow us for global trade insights and updates from DutyInsight hubs.

linkedin.desc: B2B strategy reports, EU market insights, and macroeconomic updates.

instagram.desc: Company culture, team dynamics, and behind-the-scenes from Prague and Istanbul.

footer.tagline: Pre-customs trade intelligence for global growth.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: DutyInsight attaches the utmost importance to the protection of data belonging to the corporate clients who use our services. This Privacy Policy explains, in accordance with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK), the EU GDPR, and applicable legislation, the scope within which the data we collect through the dutyinsight.com website and platform is processed and protected.

section1.title: 1. Data Controller and Definitions
section1.body: DutyInsight acts as the data controller under both KVKK and GDPR. Client refers to the legal entity benefiting from services; Personal Data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person.

section2.title: 2. Categories of Data Processed
section2.body: The following categories of data are processed: Identification and Contact Data, Client Company Data, Operational Trade Data (HS codes, trade routes), Technical Data, and Financial Data.

section3.title: 3. Purposes and Legal Bases
section3.body: Data is processed for the Performance of a Contract, Legal Obligations, and Legitimate Interests (ensuring Platform security and service quality).

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.body: The Company applies industry-standard technical measures (TLS 1.3, AES-256) to safeguard sensitive B2B data. Access is restricted through RBAC and MFA.

section5.title: 5. Data Transfers
section5.body: Data may be shared with group companies, GDPR-compliant processors, or public authorities where required by law. Cross-border transfers adhere to SCCs.

section6.title: 6. Data Subject Rights
section6.body: As a data subject, you have the right to request access, rectification, deletion (right to be forgotten), and data portability under GDPR and KVKK.

section7.title: 7. Retention Periods
section7.body: Data is retained only for the period required by law (e.g., 10 years for contracts, 5 years for financial records).

section8.title: 8. Cookies
section8.body: Cookies are used for functional and analytical purposes. Please refer to our Cookie Policy for details.

section9.title: 9. Updates
section9.body: The Company reserves the right to revise this Policy. Material changes will be notified via email.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For requests regarding your data, contact us at info@dutyinsight.com. Requests are addressed within the legal timeframe.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern the use of dutyinsight.com and its services. By accessing the Platform, you accept these Terms as binding.

section1.title: 1. Definition of Services
section1.body: Services include trade intelligence reports, risk analyses, and CBAM/ESG assessments for professional B2B use.

section2.title: 2. Account Authorisation
section2.body: Clients must provide accurate information. Confidentiality of account credentials remains the Client's responsibility.

section3.title: 3. Subscription and Usage
section3.body: Entitlements are valid for 12 months. Report 01 and 02 entitlements are drawn from a shared pool. Digital B2B services are non-refundable.

disclaimer.title: 4. Legal Nature of Reports — DISCLAIMER
disclaimer.body: Reports constitute strategic advisory and do not replace official customs declarations or legal opinions. The Client remains solely responsible for any customs fines or administrative penalties.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: Liability is limited to the amount paid for the Service in the 12 months preceding a claim. Indirect damages such as loss of profit are excluded.

section6.title: 6. Data Accuracy
section6.body: Reports rely on official third-party databases. The Company is not liable for errors originating from these providers.

section7.title: 7. Client Obligations
section7.body: Information must be used for internal commercial activities only. Scraping or unauthorised access attempts are strictly prohibited.

ip.title: 8. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content and methodologies remain the exclusive property of DutyInsight or its licensors.

section9.title: 9. Termination
section9.body: The Company reserves the right to suspend or terminate access for material breaches or failure to pay.

section10.title: 10. Force Majeure
section10.body: Obligations are suspended during events outside reasonable control (e.g., natural disasters, cyber-attacks).

section11.title: 11. Governing Law
section11.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye. Disputes fall under the jurisdiction of Istanbul Courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For contractual inquiries, contact us at info@dutyinsight.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Policy explains the tracking technologies used on dutyinsight.com. By using the Platform, you accept this usage.

section1.title: 1. What Is a Cookie?
section1.body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device to recognise you on subsequent visits and remember preferences.

section2.title: 2. Categories
section2.body: We use strictly necessary cookies (essential for operation) and analytics cookies (for performance measurement).

essential.title: 3. Strictly Necessary
essential.body: These manage active sessions, security, and language preferences. They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: 4. Analytics Cookies
analytics.body: These collect anonymised interaction data to improve user experience. Usage is subject to your consent.

section5.title: 5. Third-Party Cookies
section5.body: We work only with verified, GDPR-compliant providers for analytics and content delivery.

section6.title: 6. Management
section6.body: You can manage preferences through our banner or browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may cause malfunctions.

section7.title: 7. Retention
section7.body: Persistent cookies are stored for up to 13 months, after which consent is refreshed.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For cookie-related questions, reach out to info@dutyinsight.com.

cookieBanner.message: DutyInsight uses strictly necessary cookies to ensure the Platform functions correctly and analytics cookies to improve the user experience. You can manage your preferences or accept all cookies.
